title: MineboxAdditions
description: MineboxAdditions is a mod that adds blatant features to your average Minebox gameplay !
body:
# MineboxAddition

MineboxAddition is a Minecraft Fabric Mod for version 26.1.X that introduces exciting features for your Minebox gameplay !

## Features

Access MineboxAdditions menu by pressing default ``M`` key.

On French keyboard layouts the key is bound to ``,`` ("virgule").

You can edit the mod Keybinds as you would normally do in the MInecraft settings ``Options -> Controls -> Key Binds``

![MineboxAdditions menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a89f44e532f05275f8cf61cd1aaf0b044ab88e7a.png)

### In-game Atlas

Recipes calculator and items relations, from the comfort of your game window.

![Atlas View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8ab344fcf81f2b711015d086b43b4d6c09c3dc.png)

### In-game Bestiary

Check out mob drops, stats and spawning locations

![Bestiary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58c58113cf9e146266a89a90ee40e40ccebd0870.png)

### Fishing HUD
Display the list of fishes and items you can catch for any shoal.

The weather conditions are taken into account aswell as the time and moon phases.

![Fishing HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ce5fb540dac93485a20100cf34220bbea5f4ee3.png)

### Harvestables locations
Select what you want to gather, and locate it easily with colored beams.
![Harvestables selection screen - Reworked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a05ffa7de64ab614fa1ce1feace209b896af170.png)

![Harvestables Beams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e814fedbbac988356fd082c019ddd7ff855d98bf.png)

### Hud and Hud editor
Display important information like upcoming weather, mermaid request, shop offers, full moon indicator.
Drag, disable, the placement is up to you !

![Hud Editor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7fff13e7af2e347aa5e89414bdd4bb56c21831.png)

### Museum indicators
Know exactly from any inventory which items are missing in your museum.
![Museum Indicators (rainbow border)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1395cc35233e8494598d7a2e9679f28cf8d7ed57.png)

### Wardrobe-like feature
Save your own sets and equip them quickly from your ``/extrainv`` !

This system is intended from non-sub users as Minebox now implements their own Wardrobe system.

### Alerts Settings
Toast alerts when server shops open, toast alerts when another MineboxAdditions user discover what the shop offers.

Supported shops : Mouse, Bakery, Buckstar, Sharkoffee

### Durability bars and Items background rarities
Display a durability bar for haversacks filling, for tools durability.

Background colors for item rairities with customizable transparency and shape.

![Durability / Fill bars & Rarities colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b6c7fee14a81ef772bfa5273fc1e214f0c1077a.png)

### Items pickup tooltips
Know exactly what enters your inventory when farming.

You can configure how much lines to display, for how long...

![Item pickup tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6728ccf9d40b91f7c58815d74f5818160390e03.png)

### Other features
- Shinies alerts > Send (and receive) alerts when other MineboxAdditions users finds a shiny mob
- Base Stats > Display item base stats by pressing [LEFT ALT] on their tooltip
- TP to island on connect

## Available locales
- French
- English
- Polish
- Chinese
- Russian
